title: Conquest: Small Ships
description: Conquest Reforged mod compatibility resource pack for Small Ships.
body:
[![Project Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iBiOO1X.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rTrmBCww) Resource pack support for [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) to match the style of the [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) mod.
### Work in progress pack
Currently implemented All planned model features for the Drakkar

Custom colors available by using a name tag on a ship **Drakkar** - RedWhite - BlueWhite - YellowBlack - OrangeYellow - BlackWhite - GreenWhite - GreenBlue - OffWhite - GrayRed - GreenLime - YellowRed - BlueRed - PurpleYellow - TanOrange - GreenYellow - Rainbow - Trans - Torn



### Huge thanks and credit to Monsterfish for allowing me to use some textures from [Conquest_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/conquest_)
